memoryArtifacts.headline: Blason de la Maison de Toucy
memoryArtifacts.description:
Blason de la Maison de Toucy
De gueules, à trois pals de vair, au chef d'or chargé de quatre merlettes de gueules.

sourceList.title: Ithier III de Toucy (Mentioned as Father.)

zh.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh.Montpaon, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France: 法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫蒙包
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ithier de Toucy III於1102年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾圖希時，他的父親Narjot II de Toucy36歲，母親Mathilde de Saint Omer26歲。他與Elisabeth de Joigny結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1149年在巴勒斯坦享年47歲。

zh-hans.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh-hans.Montpaon, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France: 法国米迪-列內斯艾維倫蒙包
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ithier de Toucy III于1102年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾圖希时，他的父亲Narjot II de Toucy36岁，母亲Mathilde de Saint Omer26岁。他与Elisabeth de Joigny结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1149年在巴勒斯坦享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Cecile, Lucien, Gilles, Normand, Marcel, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Laurent, Alphonse.
French: habitational name from Soucy, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Soucie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Ludger, Pierre.

en.lifeSummary: When Ithier de Toucy III was born in 1102, in Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Narjot II de Toucy, was 36 and his mother, Mathilde de Saint Omer, was 26. He married Elisabeth de Joigny. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1149, in Palestine, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ithier de Toucy III est né en 1102, à Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Narjot II de Toucy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Saint Omer, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth de Joigny. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1149, à Palestine, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ithier de Toucy III 1102 in Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Narjot II de Toucy 36 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Saint Omer 26. Er hat Elisabeth de Joigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1149 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ithier de Toucy III è nato il nel 1102 nel Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Narjot II de Toucy, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Saint Omer, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth de Joigny. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1149, nel Palestina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Toucy, Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, France: フランスボウルゴグンイオントウシ

ja.Montpaon, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France: フランスミディ-プイルeンeスエイビーロンモントプアオン
ja.Bazarne, Yonne, France: フランスボウルゴグンイオン
ja.lifeSummary: Ithier de Toucy IIIが1102年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオントウシで生まれた時，父Narjot II de Toucyは36歳，母Mathilde de Saint Omerは26歳であった。Elisabeth de Joignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1149年にパレスチナで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ithier de Toucy III(이)가 1102년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 토우시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Narjot II de Toucy(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Saint Omer(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Elisabeth de Joigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1149년 팔레스타인에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ithier de Toucy III nasceu em 1102, em Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Narjot II de Toucy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Saint Omer, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth de Joigny. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1149, em Palestina, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ithier de Toucy III родился в 1102 г. в местности тоуси, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Narjot II de Toucy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Saint Omer, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth de Joigny. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1149 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ithier de Toucy III nació en 1102, en Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Narjot II de Toucy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Saint Omer, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elisabeth de Joigny. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1149, en Palestina, a la edad de 47 años.
